# name: # Canonical dependency manifest for IDEATOR. TAB-separated. Probe passes when it exits 0.
# IDEATOR is mostly a dialogue skill. Companions (market-scanner, foundry, pressroom) are PLUGINS,
# referenced by capability, not probed here. The rich user-facing dossier is rendered by pressroom's
# own tools (typst/latex/dot) when /publish is invoked — those are pressroom's deps, checked by
# Built-in WebSearch/WebFetch (native Claude tools) are the always-on web-research baseline — no
# install, no probe. The shipped Fetch MCP (.mcp.json) adds keyless URL→markdown extraction.

install-hint: apt install curl — only /ideator:name (name-search) needs it to probe npm/pypi/crates/GitHub, neighbour-search, and RDAP domains; core ideation does not
apt install jq — only /ideator:name (name-search) needs it to build/parse the availability JSON; core ideation does not
GitHub CLI (cli.github.com) — used by self-improve to open the improvement PR

# name: # Optional: set GITHUB_TOKEN/GH_TOKEN (not a binary, so not probed) for name-search — lifts GitHub rate
# limits (60→5000/hr core, 10→30/min search); REQUIRED for a reliable --neighbors pass or it reports unknown.

install-hint: uv (launches `uvx mcp-server-fetch` — web research: validate value/price, wedge, stack-fit against live pages)
